name: Workflow Advisor
description: Describe any business task and Claude AI will design a complete automation workflow for it, recommending tools, steps, and integrations. The workflow blueprint is posted to Slack.

source.originalName: Build custom workflows automatically with GPT-4o, RAG, and web search

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the workflow design

taskDescription.description: Describe the task you want to automate (e.g. 'When a new lead fills out a form, enrich their data, score them, and notify sales on Slack')

constraints.description: Any constraints or preferences (e.g. 'must use Google Sheets', 'budget-friendly tools only')
